compiled_state.title: dso:sprint: sprint concludes without invoking end-session -> session cleanup skipped
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
Chronic issue: /dso:sprint consistently fails to invoke /dso:end (end-session) at sprint conclusion. Has been reported and partially addressed in multiple prior bugs and resolution attempts without full resolution.

## Expected Behavior
After Phase 9 (session close), /dso:sprint should run end-session cleanup: technical learnings generation, session summary, worktree validation (is_merged + is_clean checks).

## Actual Behavior
Sprint ends after Phase 9 task closures without running end-session. Worktrees are left without cleanup validation, and technical learnings/session summaries are not generated.

## Prior History
Multiple fix attempts across prior debug sessions — issue persists. Appears to be an LLM-behavioral failure where the orchestrator exits the skill after closing tickets rather than continuing to the session-close phase.
